_comment: Least-privilege IAM policy for the Recall PROCESS Lambda. Attach as a customer-managed policy to recall-process-role (alongside AWS-managed AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole for CloudWatch Logs). It can READ raw objects and UPDATE existing metadata rows — nothing more. No s3:PutObject (so it can never re-trigger itself) and no dynamodb:PutItem/DeleteItem. The embedding model + Pinecone are external HTTPS APIs (not AWS), so they need API keys in env vars, NOT IAM permissions. Replace ACCOUNT_ID, bucket, and table names with your values.
